title: boechera perennans subsp. zephyra
intro: Boechera perennans subsp. zephyra, also known as mountain rockcress, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the mustard family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and slender leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Boechera perennans subsp. zephyra include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Boechera perennans subsp. zephyra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health.
